zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie於1413年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，她的父親Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock38歲，母親Joanna Montgomerie34歲。她和Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1453年9月16日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆享年40歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾文寧吉爾文寧 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie于1413年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，她的父亲Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock38岁，母亲Joanna Montgomerie34岁。她和Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1453年9月16日在苏格兰雷福福爾易阿格萊善姆享年40岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾文寧吉爾文寧 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie was born in 1413, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock, was 38 and her mother, Joanna Montgomerie, was 34. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie. She died on 16 September 1453, in Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 40, and was buried in Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie. Elle est décédée le 16 septembre 1453, à Eaglesham, Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilwinning Churchyard, Kilwinning, North Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie è nata il nel 1413 nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Joanna Montgomerie, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerieが1413年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnockは38歳，母Joanna Montgomerieは34歳であった。彼女はAlexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerieとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1453年9月16日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエアグレシャムで40歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアキルウィニングキルウィニング チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie(이)가 1413년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Montgomerie(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1453년 9월 16일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 이글레샤에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 킬윈잉 킬윈잉 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Boyd Baroness Montgomerie родилась в 1413 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Thomas Boyd 4th Feudal Baron of Kilmarnock было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Montgomerie, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Alexander Montgomery 1st Lord Montgomerie. Она умерла 16 сентября 1453 г. в местности эаглешам, ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности килвиннинг чурчярд, килвиннинг, норт аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
